Event: Summer Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR273
Magic Tenacity Outfit

When taking magic damage, the armor wearer deals 500000 (+bonus of spell power) magic damage to the attacker and silences them. The enemy unit can't use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) for 3 sec. The ability can be applied to the same unit only once in 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
